pageContext.name: Valstrax Creator's Model
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Valstrax Creator's Model Collectible Figure!  From the exciting video game franchise Monster Hunter, this Elder Dragon stands over 8.5' tall with his large muscular wings and jet-like flames already primed for a high-speed, powerful attack.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
